---
title: "Jane Doe"
subtitle: "PhD Student"
image: ../../../assets/img/people/jane-doe.jpg
---

## About
Jane works on methane point source detection and attribution from satellite observations.

## Interests
- Methane retrievals
- Inverse modeling
- Uncertainty quantification

## Links
- Google Scholar: *add*
- ORCID: *add*
- GitHub: *add*

## Projects
- [Methane Plumes](../../../research/projects/project-example/)
